name: @openclaw/openclaw-url-tailwind-scaffold
description: Native OpenClaw plugin that accepts a reference page URL and returns a bounded Tailwind CSS v4 app-shell scaffold summary.
author: TeodorArg

scripts.lint: biome check index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm pack:smoke
scripts.pack:smoke: sh -c 'rm -rf .pack .npm-cache && mkdir -p .pack .npm-cache && trap "rm -rf .npm-cache" EXIT && npm_config_cache=.npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json > .pack/pack.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from \"node:fs\"; const pack = JSON.parse(readFileSync(\".pack/pack.json\", \"utf8\"))[0]; const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(\"package.json\", \"utf8\")); const manifest = JSON.parse(readFileSync(\"openclaw.plugin.json\", \"utf8\")); const slug = typeof pkg.name === \"string\" ? pkg.name.replace(/^@openclaw\\//u, \"\") : \"\"; const paths = new Set(pack.files.map((file) => file.path)); for (const required of [\"dist/index.js\", \"dist/src/index.js\", \"dist/api.js\", \"openclaw.plugin.json\", \"skills/openclaw-url-tailwind-scaffold/SKILL.md\", \"README.md\", \"LICENSE\"]) { if (!paths.has(required)) { throw new Error(\"Missing packed artifact: \" + required); } } if (!slug || manifest.id !== slug) { throw new Error(\"Manifest id does not match package slug.\"); } if (pkg.version !== manifest.version) { throw new Error(\"package.json and openclaw.plugin.json versions differ.\"); } if (!Array.isArray(pkg.openclaw?.extensions) || !pkg.openclaw.extensions.includes(\"./dist/index.js\")) { throw new Error(\"package.json openclaw.extensions must include ./dist/index.js.\"); }"'
